CustomMetadata.label: MS-004 - Named Credentials using Basic authentication

values.value: One or more Named Credentials use AuthProtocol PASSWORD (Basic authentication). Usernames and passwords are stored in the Salesforce platform credential store as static credentials.
Static username and password stored in Salesforce are at risk if the org is compromised or the Named Credential configuration is exported. Basic auth credentials do not rotate automatically.
Migrate to OAuth 2.0 Named Credentials. Use client credentials flow for server-to-server integrations. Update the Named Credential auth protocol and remove stored passwords after migration.
